summary: Clean green run reported (0.11.0 plugin + CLI; 3 stages A/B/C; 6 implement / 3 review / 1 test rounds; 22 findings REV-001..012 + TEST-001..010 all verified, zero open). plan.md finalized to as-built (intended design held; deltas: the plan-round-2 D1/D2 custom gate redirects, the REV-004 mid-UAT waiting-for-user lock, the TEST-004 classifier status-gate, the TEST-005 exact session match; 33 new Go tests). Bundle per the 0.8.0 slim rule: article report.md (ends ## Summary (TL;DR)) + flow.mmd (intended chart with the mid-UAT lock folded into the UAT branch) + NEW sequence.mmd (the UAT loop end-to-end: accept via /gogo:done, or issues -> lock -> analyst -> re-accept -> rerun same item) + manifest.json + before/ (flow.mmd + rewritten manifest) - no diagrams.html. Knowledge reconciled respecting every ## Custom byte-for-byte (this feature's own guard, dogfooded): test-strategy (status-by-status state-machine spec-execution; one-legal-command as a test target incl. the classifier layer), coding-rules (gate on status not artifact presence; exact-convention session matching), project-knowledge (since-0.11.0 override bullet: analyst, UAT gate + lock, ## Custom, CLI ops; 5 agents / 10 knowledge files / 0.11.0), tech-stack (cli test-count + trash package drift); analysis.md verified current (untouched); testing-tools no drift. state.md -> phase=done, STATUS=AWAITING-UAT (the new terminal this feature built - it exits through its own gate); phase-started + phase-done report events appended with real UTC timestamps.
